kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=auth_session, url=http://localhost:8000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:8000/api/users/login path_url=/api/users/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '40', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "test", "password": "test"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:8000/api/users path_url=/api/users headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6MywidXNlcm5hbWUiOiJ0ZXN0IiwiaWF0IjoxNzc3OTI5Mzk3LCJleHAiOjE3Nzc5MzI5OTd9.XVtlsFZHrm70ZcyEQxKLMouw_BCFx-B_VpOIJ8YUUTA'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://localhost:8000/api/users status=200, reason=OK headers={'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '122', 'ETag': 'W/"7a-ibEJiWXPnHaMJkz6u5rUcdUU/2A"', 'Date': 'Mon, 04 May 2026 21:16:37 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body=[{"username":"testi","created_at":"2026-04-10T16:48:10.000Z"},{"username":"test","created_at":"2026-05-04T19:17:25.000Z"}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:8000/api/entries path_url=/api/entries headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6MywidXNlcm5hbWUiOiJ0ZXN0IiwiaWF0IjoxNzc3OTI5Mzk3LCJleHAiOjE3Nzc5MzI5OTd9.XVtlsFZHrm70ZcyEQxKLMouw_BCFx-B_VpOIJ8YUUTA', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '91'} body=b'{"entry_date": "2026-05-05", "mood": 8, "sleep_hours": 7, "weight": 75, "notes": "Testing"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/Users/eparvela/HealthDiary/outputs/browser/traces/temp/6edc636b-38da-4a6d-840c-ebbc0da76ce9"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:5174/index.html
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'test' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Secret
kw.doc: Fills the given secret from ``variable_name`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=entry_date at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg:
Text: '5.5.2026
Fiilis: 8/10
Uni: 7h
Paino: 75.00kg

Feeling good after a healthy breakfast.

Poista

Uni: 7h

Fiilis: 8/10
Uni: 8h

Poista
